title: Two Weeks
writer: John Emerson, Anita Loos, Anthony Wharton
actors: Constance Talmadge, Conway Tearle, Reginald Mason
plot: A chorus girl hopes to rise to stardom and thus accepts the advances of a wealthy man. But she becomes fearful of her reputation and safety. In an attempt to escape the rake's attentions, she hides out with a disparate group of me...
